assertions.reason: Homepage loaded successfully with visible header, main, and footer regions; HTTP 200 confirmed and no blank flash observed during repeated loads.
Desktop header showed Home/Blog/About links; each link was clickable and navigated to the correct route. Client-side navigation was confirmed by in-page marker persistence across Home -> Blog.
evidence: Client-nav marker persisted after link click (window.__flowMarker = client-nav-check)

assertions.reason: Footer rendered with expected copyright text and did not overlap main content; footer/main separation confirmed on homepage, blog, and about pages.
evidence: Footer text observed: © 2026 Tech Blog. All rights reserved.

assertions.reason: At 1920x1080 viewport, main content remained centered and constrained (768px width) with large side margins, satisfying max-width constraint behavior.
evidence: Computed style on main: maxWidth=768px, width=768px
Measured margins at 1920px viewport: left=576px, right=576px

assertions.reason: Horizontal overflow exists at 375px viewport (document scrollWidth 631 > clientWidth 375), violating the no-horizontal-overflow requirement across standard viewports.
evidence: Overflow offender identified: hidden mobile drawer element at right edge contributes +256px

assertions.reason: Semantic structure is present with required elements on homepage.
evidence: DOM counts: header=1, nav=2, main=1, footer=1

assertions.reason: Active page indicator changed correctly across pages: current route link uses active text style while non-active links use muted style.
evidence: Observed class/state shifts: active link uses text-foreground; inactive links use text-muted

frictions.description: agent-browser required LD_LIBRARY_PATH export for stable execution in this environment; without it, browser commands were unreliable.
frictions.resolution: Prefixed each agent-browser command with export LD_LIBRARY_PATH="/home/kongyu/miniconda3/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH".
